title: Spanish Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Spanish-inspired stir fry with a light and creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for an additional minute.
Return the chicken to the skillet and pour in the creamy sauce.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
